mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trip WHERE member_id = #{memberId}) AS totalTripCount, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT r.sido_name) FROM conquest_map cm JOIN region r ON cm.region_id = r.region_id WHERE cm.member_id = #{memberId}) AS visitedRegionCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trip WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND status = 'COMPLETED') AS completedTripCount, (SELECT NVL(AVG(end_date - start_date + 1), 0) FROM trip WHERE member_id = #{memberId}) AS avgTripDays FROM dual
SELECT DISTINCT r.sido_name FROM conquest_map cm JOIN region r ON cm.region_id = r.region_id WHERE cm.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY r.sido_name
SELECT DISTINCT r.sido_name FROM conquest_map cm JOIN region r ON cm.region_id = r.region_id WHERE cm.member_id = #{memberId} AND cm.trip_place_id IS NULL ORDER BY r.sido_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conquest_map (conquest_map_id, member_id, region_id, conquest_date) SELECT SEQ_CONQUEST_MAP_ID.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, r.region_id, SYSDATE FROM region r WHERE r.sido_name = #{sidoName} AND r.api_sigungu_code IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM conquest_map cm WHERE cm.member_id = #{memberId} AND cm.region_id = r.region_id AND cm.trip_place_id IS NULL ) AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.select: SELECT r.RESERVATION_ID AS "reservationId", r.ROOM_ID AS "roomId", r.CHECK_IN_DATE AS "checkIn", r.CHECK_OUT_DATE AS "checkOut", r.STATUS AS "status", p.PLACE_NAME AS "accommodationName", p.ADDRESS AS "address", rm.ROOM_NAME AS "roomName" FROM RESERVATION r JOIN ROOM rm ON r.ROOM_ID = rm.ROOM_ID JOIN ACCOMMODATION a ON rm.PLACE_ID = a.PLACE_ID JOIN PLACE p ON a.PLACE_ID = p.PLACE_ID WHERE r.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY r.CHECK_IN_DATE DESC

SELECT c.conquest_map_id AS conquestMapId, c.member_id AS memberId, c.region_id AS regionId, r.sigungu_name AS sigunguName, c.color_code AS colorCode, TO_CHAR(c.start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDate, TO_CHAR(c.end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDate, c.memo AS memo, TO_CHAR(c.conquest_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS conquestDate FROM conquest_map c JOIN region r ON c.region_id = r.region_id WHERE c.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY c.conquest_map_id
SELECT photo_id AS photoId, conquest_map_id AS conquestMapId, photo_url AS photoUrl FROM conquest_map_photo WHERE conquest_map_id = #{conquestMapId} ORDER BY photo_id
SELECT region_id FROM region WHERE sigungu_name = #{sigunguName} FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CONQUEST_MAP_ID.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO conquest_map ( conquest_map_id, member_id, region_id, color_code, start_date, end_date, memo, conquest_date ) VALUES ( #{conquestMapId}, #{memberId}, #{regionId}, #{colorCode}, TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{memo}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE conquest_map SET color_code = #{colorCode}, start_date = TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), end_date = TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), memo = #{memo}, conquest_date = SYSDATE WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND region_id = #{regionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conquest_map_photo (photo_id, conquest_map_id, photo_url) VALUES (conquest_map_photo_seq.NEXTVAL, #{conquestMapId}, #{photoUrl})
